features.featureTitle: Build a multi-page React frontend with client-side routing supporting: Home (/), All Listings (/listings), Property Detail (/listings/:id), About Us (/about), Contact (/contact), and Admin Dashboard (/admin).

Build the Home page with: (1) a full-width hero banner using the generated hero image, a bold headline, a sub-headline, and a search bar with dropdowns for Property Type (Residential/Commercial), Max Budget (range options), and Location (text input) plus a Search button that navigates to /listings with query params; (2) a 'Featured Properties' horizontal carousel showing featured listings (image, title, price, location, type badge, View Details button); (3) a 'Why Choose Us' section with 3–4 icon+text cards highlighting trust signals (e.g., expert agents, verified listings, fast deals, local market knowledge).

Build the All Listings page (/listings) with a sidebar/top filter panel (Property Type, Max Budget, Location) and a responsive grid of property cards. Each card shows: thumbnail image, title, price, square footage, location, type badge, and a 'View Details' button linking to /listings/:id. Apply active filters from URL query params on load and update URL when filters change.

Build the Property Detail page (/listings/:id) with: (1) a multi-image gallery (thumbnail strip + large preview); (2) full property details (title, price, sqft, location, type, amenities list, full description); (3) an embedded map placeholder section labeled 'Location Map' (using a static map image or iframe placeholder since external map APIs are not supported natively); (4) a 'Book a Visit / Inquiry' form with fields for Name, Email, Phone, Message, and a Submit button that calls submitInquiry on the backend and shows a success confirmation.

Build the About Us page with sections: a hero banner with tagline, a 'Our Story' narrative paragraph, a stats row (e.g., Years in Business, Properties Sold, Happy Clients, Cities Covered), a 'Meet the Team' section with 3 placeholder agent cards (photo, name, title), and a trust-building 'Our Values' section with 3–4 icon+text items.

Build the Contact page (/contact) with: a contact form (Name, Email, Phone, Subject, Message fields) that submits via submitInquiry with propertyId set to 'general'; an office info block showing a placeholder phone number, email address, and office address; and a map placeholder section consistent with the Property Detail page style.

Build an Admin Dashboard page (/admin) with two tabs: 'Manage Listings' and 'Inquiries'. Manage Listings tab: displays all properties in a table with Edit and Delete actions; includes an 'Add New Property' button that opens a modal/form for creating or editing a property (all fields: title, description, price, sqft, location, type, amenities, imageUrls as comma-separated input, isFeatured toggle). Inquiries tab: displays all submitted leads in a table with columns for property, visitor name, email, phone, message, and timestamp.

Implement a persistent global navigation header with the Prime Properties logo/wordmark, nav links (Home, Listings, About, Contact), and a prominent 'List Your Property' CTA button. Include a responsive mobile hamburger menu. Add a footer with company name, quick links, contact info placeholder, and a copyright line.

Apply a consistent design system across all pages: Deep Navy (#0A1628) as the primary brand color, White (#FFFFFF) as background, Gold (#C9A84C) as accent for CTAs, borders, and highlights, and light gray (#F5F5F5) for section backgrounds. Use a clean sans-serif font stack. Ensure all pages are fully responsive (mobile, tablet, desktop) with appropriate spacing, card shadows, and hover states on interactive elements.

Render the generated static images (hero banner, logo, agent placeholders, property sample images) from the frontend/public/assets/generated directory and reference them in the appropriate page components.
